title: Jack And Jill
content:
Jack and Jill went up the hill
    To fetch a pail of water;
    Jack fell down and broke his crown,
    And Jill came tumbling after.
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Jack And Jill"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
